meta.name: Bufab Design System
meta.description: Full glassmorphism theme on a rich dark teal background. All surfaces are frosted glass. Cyan accents electric on dark. Every component is affected.
meta.usage: Store each top-level section as a separate LanceDB document chunk for MCP retrieval. Tag each chunk with its 'category' field for semantic search.

tokens.description: Core design primitives for the glassmorphism theme. The page background is always the dark teal gradient. All surfaces sit on top of it as frosted glass layers.

page.usage: Full-page background gradient — always applied to body/root. Never a flat color.

pageFixed.usage: Fallback flat color for environments that do not support gradients

surface.usage: Default frosted glass fill — cards, panels, sidebar, modal

surfaceHover.usage: Glass surface on hover — interactive cards, nav items

surfaceActive.usage: Glass surface on active/selected — selected rows, active tabs

border.usage: Default glass border — all frosted surfaces

borderBright.usage: Glass border on hover or focus

blur.usage: backdrop-filter value for all glass surfaces

primaryMid.usage: Mid-tone for dividers, secondary glass borders

primaryLight.usage: Light brand tint for subtle highlights on dark

cyan.usage: Primary accent — focus rings, active states, CTA glows, progress fills, icon highlights

cyanBright.usage: Lighter cyan for text on dark backgrounds, secondary highlights

cyanSubtle.usage: Soft cyan tint — hover fills, selected rows, drag-over zones

cyanGlow.usage: Glow box-shadow for primary buttons and active inputs

skyBlue.usage: Soft blue — secondary text on dark, upload zone accents, app name in topbar

skyBlueSubtle.usage: Very subtle blue wash — alternating table rows, section tints

muted.usage: Placeholder text, disabled states, table header labels

accent.usage: Cyan accent text — part numbers, active labels, links

accentSoft.usage: Sky blue text — app name, secondary accented labels

success.usage: Positive status — glassy green on dark

info.usage: Info — reuse cyan, consistent with accent system

effects.description: Named effect tokens. Every component references these rather than hardcoding values.

usage.glassShadow: Default shadow on all glass cards and panels
usage.cyanFocusRing: Focus indicator on all interactive elements
usage.cyanGlowStrong: Glow on primary button active or CTA emphasis
usage.badgeFloat: Shadow giving badges a floating look on glass
usage.uploadZoneIdle: Dashed border effect on idle upload zone
usage.uploadZoneActive: Upload zone border and glow on drag-over
usage.skeletonGradient: Shimmer animation gradient for skeleton loaders
usage.innerTopHighlight: Subtle top inner highlight for glass depth illusion

letterSpacing.usage-wide: Use 'wide' on uppercase labels and table headers

layout.description: Grid system and structural dimensions. Note: The topbar is fixed/sticky; the app-shell must offset the main content by 'topbarHeight' to maintain visibility.
rules: Main content area uses a 12-column responsive grid.
Grid gutter is fixed at 16px across all breakpoints.
Maximum content width is capped at 1280px for readability on ultra-wide displays.
Sidebar is persistent on desktop (>=1024px) and hidden on mobile/tablet (<1024px).
All layout dimensions (offsets, heights) must reference the layout tokens to ensure consistency.

components.description: All 27 components reworked for the glassmorphism theme. Every surface is frosted glass on the dark teal gradient background. Text is white or near-white. Accents are cyan and sky blue.

button.description: Glass-surfaced buttons. Primary has a cyan glow on hover that makes it pop off the dark background. Secondary is a ghost glass outline. All variants have a top inner highlight for the glass depth effect.

input.description: Dark glass input field. Resting state is a very subtle glass surface. On focus the bottom border glows cyan and the field brightens slightly. Placeholder text is muted white.

card.description: Frosted glass panel. The inner top highlight creates the illusion of light hitting the glass surface. Shadow grounds it against the dark background. Hover lifts it with a stronger shadow.
card.transition: box-shadow 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease, background 200ms ease

badge.description: Glass pill badges that float above the surface. Each semantic variant uses a translucent tinted background with a matching border glow. The float shadow makes them feel like physical labels.

table.description: Glass table. The container is a glass card. Header row is slightly darker glass. Data rows are transparent by default, alternating rows get a hairline sky-blue tint. Selected rows get a cyan tint with a left border glow strip.

topbar.description: Fully transparent topbar — the page gradient shows through. A very subtle bottom border in low-opacity white separates it from the content. The logo lockup and nav links float on the gradient.
rules: Topbar background is always the transparent glass layer — never solid
BUFAB brand name is always #FFFFFF weight 700
App name is always #a8d8e8 weight 400 — never bold
Active nav item text is #4ecdc4 with a subtle cyan glass background
Never put a page title inside the topbar
Main content container must include a top offset (padding or margin) equal to 'layout.topbarHeight' to prevent overlap.

sidebar.description: Frosted glass left panel. Nav items are transparent by default. Active item gets a cyan left border strip, cyan text, and a subtle cyan glass background pill.
rules: Sidebar must start below the topbar (top: layout.topbarHeight) to avoid overlapping header content.
Alternatively, if full-height, Topbar must have a higher z-index than Sidebar.

breadcrumb.description: Minimal breadcrumb on dark. Separator and past items are muted white. Current page is sky blue.

tabs.description: Tab bar on the glass surface. Container has a bottom divider in low-opacity white. Active tab has a cyan bottom border that glows slightly.

modal.description: Heavy frosted glass panel over a blurred dark overlay. The panel has a strong inner top highlight and deep shadow to distinguish it from the page glass layers.

toast.description: Glass toast notifications. Slide in from the right with a subtle blur. Each variant has a tinted glass background and a matching left glow border.

select.description: Glass dropdown. Trigger matches input styling. The open panel is a heavier glass layer floating above with a shadow. Option hover is a subtle white tint.

checkbox.description: Glass-framed checkbox. Unchecked shows a subtle white border on dark. Checked fills with a translucent cyan glass and shows a white checkmark. Focus ring is cyan.

radio.description: Glass radio button. Same treatment as checkbox but circular. Inner dot is white on cyan glass fill.

toggle.description: Glass toggle switch. Off track is a dark glass pill. On track glows cyan with a subtle outer glow. Thumb is a bright white circle with a shadow.

searchBar.description: Prominent glass search bar. On focus, the search icon turns cyan and the field brightens. The clear button appears as a ghost × on the right when text is present.

pagination.description: Glass pill pagination. Page buttons are ghost on dark. Active page is a cyan glass pill with a glow. Prev/Next are ghost icon buttons.

emptyState.description: Centered empty state on dark. Icon is a large outline in muted cyan. Heading is white. Body text is secondary white. Optional CTA is the primary button.

skeleton.description: Dark glass skeleton. Base is a very subtle white tint. Shimmer sweeps a slightly brighter white wave — visible against the dark background.

tooltip.description: Dark glass tooltip. Slightly heavier blur than standard glass so it reads clearly on any background. Text is white. Arrow matches the panel.

spinner.description: Circular spinner on dark. Track is a low-opacity white ring. Spinning arc is cyan with a subtle glow trailing edge.
spinner.usage: For AI generation use lg centered in the description panel with label 'Generating description…'

progressSteps.description: Glass stepper. Step indicators are glass pills. Active step glows cyan. Completed steps show a cyan checkmark. Connectors are low-opacity lines that fill to cyan as steps complete.

alert.description: Glass alert banner. Tinted glass background matching the severity. Left border is the semantic accent color. Text is white. Icon glows in the accent color.

productCard.description: Glass product card for catalog grid. Thumbnail area is a darker glass layer. Part number is cyan monospace. Name is white. Description is muted white. On hover the whole card lifts and the border brightens.

descriptionPanel.description: Glass output panel for AI-generated descriptions. Idle state has a dashed cyan border. Generating state pulses with a cyan glow. Ready state shows clean white text on glass.

idle.text: Upload a document to generate a product description

fileUpload.description: Glass upload zone. Dashed border in low-opacity cyan. Background is a very subtle sky-blue glass tint. On drag-over it activates the cyan glow ring and the icon turns cyan. Upload progress bar fills from brand mid to cyan.

primary.text: Drop your file here, or click to browse

secondary.text: Supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX — max 20 MB

filePreview.layout: flex row: file icon | filename + size | remove button

copyRules.idle: Drop your file here, or click to browse
copyRules.error: Upload failed. Please try again or choose a different file.

chip.description: Glass chip / filter tag. Resting state is a subtle white glass pill. Selected state becomes a cyan glass pill with a glow border. Remove icon fades in on hover.

writingStyle.description: Tone and copy guidelines. Unchanged from v1 — glassmorphism is a visual theme, not a voice change.
writingStyle.tone: Professional, clear, and direct. Bufab serves industrial B2B customers — avoid marketing fluff.
writingStyle.labels: Short and scannable. Use sentence case for descriptions, ALL CAPS only for badges and button labels.
writingStyle.cta: Action-oriented verbs: Search, Filter, Download, Generate, Add to order.
writingStyle.errors: Explain what happened and what the user can do next. Never blame the user.
writingStyle.empty_states: Explain why content is missing and offer a clear action to resolve it.

examples.search_placeholder: Search by part number, description, or category…
examples.empty_catalog: No products match your search. Try adjusting your filters.
examples.upload_prompt: Drop your product datasheet here, or click to browse
examples.upload_hint: Supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX — max 20 MB
examples.upload_error: Upload failed. Please try again or choose a different file.
